title: Auth middleware accepts expired JWTs under high request load
body:
We noticed that under sustained high load (>500 req/s), a small percentage of requests carrying an already-expired JWT are still being let through by the auth middleware instead of getting a 401. We suspect a race condition in the token-expiry cache check.

This is a security vulnerability since it effectively lets a stolen-but-expired token keep working intermittently. Confirmed reproducible against a load-test environment with k6; happy to share the script. Affects all users since this sits in the shared middleware pipeline.
